media.base_medium: Coates-lab defined marine/estuarine anaerobic minimal medium (2% NaCl) with vitamin mix + two mineral mixes; acetate donor, iodate acceptor

sources_chased.what: base minimal-media salts (Methods: Media, chemicals, and culture conditions)
vitamin mix + mineral mix one + mineral mix two composition (Supplementary Methods, MOESM1)
sources_chased.how: downloaded EuropePMC supplementaryFiles zip (rest/PMC8692401/supplementaryFiles), extracted 41396_2021_1034_MOESM1_ESM.docx word/document.xml
added: 10 vitamins (biotin, folic acid, pyridoxine, riboflavin, thiamine, nicotinic acid, pantothenic acid, B12, PABA, lipoic acid)
mineral mix two bulk salts (NaCl, NH4Cl, KCl, KH2PO4, MgSO4, CaCl2)

missing_before: sodium iodate (electron acceptor, listed as uncovered)
media.notes: Complete recipe = base minimal-media salts (main text) + vitamin mix (10 mL/L) + mineral mix one trace-element solution (10 mL/L) + mineral mix two bulk-salt solution (20 mL/L), all from Supplementary Methods, plus 10 mM sodium acetate (donor) and 2 mM sodium iodate (acceptor). Anaerobic: oxygen sparged, 80% N2/20% CO2 headspace; no chemical reductant (no cysteine/sulfide/Na2S) is stated in the paper. Base line contains a typographic duplication '0.24 g Na2MoO4 0.20 g'; 0.24 g/L taken. Vitamin/trace concentrations are given as stock (per liter of mix) with the stated addition volume; concentration_mM left null for these because in-medium micro-amounts were not tabulated by the authors. The current_uncovered items (iodate, vitamin mix, mineral mix) are now fully expanded.
